response.justification: Strong foundational engineer with 19 years of experience and proven entrepreneurial capability, but the role requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' This candidate's AI work is recent (3 months at re:cinq in AI infrastructure) and lacks the depth and track record of building AI-powered products or strategic advisory experience needed for a Principal Engineer - AI Strategy role. Better fit for infrastructure-focused engineering leadership.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 19 years across software, hardware, infrastructure, and web platforms
Proven builder mentality with hands-on technical execution and successful open-source GISCollective project with real users
Exceptional technical versatility across multiple languages, full-stack web, infrastructure (Docker/Kubernetes/CI-CD), and emerging AI infrastructure (MCP)
concerns: AI expertise is nascent—only 3 months in current role with MCP/agentic workflows; no demonstrated history of building AI products or platforms
Background is primarily infrastructure and GIS applications rather than AI strategy, product innovation, or advising customers on AI differentiation
Missing preferred qualifications: no Master's or PhD in AI/ML-related field; limited evidence of strategic advisory or cross-functional product leadership at customer/partner level

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
